_meta: English translations. Keys: <page>.<section>.<element>. Shared keys (nav, footer, cta, cookies) live in js/i18n.json for client-side JS swap and are duplicated here for build-time output to /en/.
footer.tagline: From ceremony to stage, from food trailer to books. Production, booking and coordination, Lisbon.
